children.heading: Identification of industries and development of plan
children.label: a Identification of industries and development of plan

children.text: identify those civilian industries in the United States that are necessary to support a robust manufacturing infrastructure and critical to the economic security of the United States; and

list the major research and development initiatives being undertaken, and the substantial investments being made, by the Federal Government, including its research laboratories, in each of the critical industries identified under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Initial report
children.label: b Initial report
children.text: The Secretary shall submit a report to the Congress within 1 year after , on the actions taken under subsection (a).February 14, 1992
